anthony edwards.detail: Played 36 minutes in a blowout loss; normal game, no injury flag

ausar thompson.detail: Played 24 minutes before fouling out; foul disqualification, not an injury exit

cade cunningham.detail: Played 42 minutes in a playoff win; normal game, no injury flag

de'aaron fox.detail: Left Game 6 in the first half with an ankle injury; returned to start the second half

evan mobley.detail: Played 36 minutes; no injury flags or external sources indicating an issue

jaden mcdaniels.detail: Played 23 minutes in a blowout loss; no injury flags or external sources indicating an issue

james harden.detail: Played 37 minutes in a playoff loss; normal game, no injury flag

jarrett allen.detail: Played 30 minutes; no injury flags or external sources indicating an issue

julius randle.detail: Played 24 minutes in a blowout loss; missed pick due to cold shooting (1-8 FG) in a season-ending blowout
julius randle.web_narrative: Randle shot just 1-of-8 from the field for 3 points in 24 minutes as Minnesota was blown out 139-109 in a season-ending Game 6 loss. The miss was due to poor shooting performance in a blowout, not injury or limited minutes.

rudy gobert.detail: Played 22 minutes in a blowout loss; was listed as questionable with a left rib sprain but no confirmed exit
rudy gobert.web_narrative: Gobert grabbed only 3 rebounds in 22 minutes as Minnesota was blown out 139-109 in Game 6. He was reportedly dealing with a left rib sprain heading into the game, and the blowout likely limited his opportunities and minutes.

stephon castle.detail: Played 30 minutes in a blowout win; normal game, no injury flag

tobias harris.detail: Played 25 minutes; had a prior left ankle sprain from Game 5 but no confirmed exit in this game
tobias harris.web_narrative: Harris went 0-for on three-point attempts in 25 minutes after suffering a left ankle sprain in Game 5 of the prior series. No confirmed mid-game exit occurred, but the lingering ankle injury may have affected his shooting and shot selection.

victor wembanyama.detail: Played 27 minutes in a blowout win; missed rebound prop due to limited minutes in a lopsided game
victor wembanyama.web_narrative: Wembanyama played only 27 minutes in a 30-point blowout win and finished with 6 rebounds, falling short of the over 8 mark. Reduced playing time in a comfortable victory limited his rebounding opportunities.
